narrative_beat: Double exposure de cidade moderna e paisagem biblica antiga sobrepostas com feixe dourado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a double-exposure composite of a modern city skyline overlaid with an ancient biblical landscape of hills and olive trees, joined by a vertical gold light beam
subject.focal_point: the gold vertical light beam uniting the two worlds
subject.secondary: Modern city in desaturated monochrome; biblical hills in warm gold-crimson tones.

environment.atmosphere: two ages colliding, prophecy and present

composition.rule: vertical light beam as axis uniting layers
composition.foreground: ancient landscape in rich warm tones

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares, analog double-exposure overlay
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: duas eras colidindo, profecia e presente

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
